scripts.build: pnpm run build:sdk && pnpm run build:cli
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:sdk && pnpm run typecheck:cli
scripts.release:check:sdk: pnpm run typecheck:sdk && pnpm run build:sdk && pnpm run pack:sdk
scripts.release:check:cli: pnpm -C packages/finebicli test && pnpm run typecheck:cli && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm run pack:cli
scripts.release:check:core: pnpm run release:check:sdk && pnpm run release:check:cli
scripts.pack:all: pnpm run pack:sdk && pnpm run pack:cli && pnpm run pack:skills
scripts.publish:core: pnpm run publish:sdk && pnpm run publish:cli
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run publish:sdk && pnpm run publish:cli && pnpm run publish:skills
